title: OpenWallet
description: Brand new economy plugin with a lot of features
body:
**OpenWallet**

Brand new economy plugin for your server\
Don't know how to start? Just check our [wiki](https://github.com/neziw/OpenWallet/wiki) page!

[Join our NEW Discord Server!](https://discord.gg/k69htTFCVk)

**Features:**

-   YAML Configuration
-   Fully customizable and unlimited shops
-   Simple management panel (for admins)
-   Admin commands
-   All messages can be translated
-   Confirmation menu
-   Option to make only once-buy items
-   SQLite and MySQL database support
-   Balance command for players
-   Vault and PlaceholderAPI hook
-   Custom aliases for plugin commands
